layouts.name: Chart With Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A chart or table with metrics slide layout

description.description: Main content text describing the company's traction and growth momentum.

growthStats.description:
Growth statistics for the company, used for chart visualization. Each entry is an object representing a specific year, with the 'year' key as a string (e.g., '2020'), and additional keys for each metric (such as 'artificialIntelligence', 'internetOfThings', 'others'), where the values are numbers representing the metric's value for that year. Example:

[
  { year: '2020', artificialIntelligence: 5, internetOfThings: 10, others: 8 },
  { year: '2021', artificialIntelligence: 10, internetOfThings: 20, others: 15 },
  ...
]
This structure allows the chart to dynamically render multiple series over time, with each metric visualized as a separate line.

items.description: Growth statistics for a specific year, with any number of metrics as key-value pairs where keys are metric names and values are numbers.

layouts.name: Image And Description
layouts.description: A slide layout with a title, a description, and an image.

content.description: Main content text describing the company or topic

image.description: Optional supporting image for the slide (building, office, etc.)

layouts.description: A slide with a title and explanatory text on the left, an optional bulleted list underneath the text, and metric cards on the right. Each metric card contains two stacked metric blocks.

description.description: Supporting text shown below the label.

layouts.name: Milestone Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top and a single horizontal milestone sequence below it. The sequence contains five circular markers aligned in one row, and each marker has a heading and description placed directly underneath. The activeIndex field controls which marker is emphasized while the remaining markers stay in the default state.

title.description: Slide title shown at the top-left.

activeIndex.description: Zero-based index of the highlighted milestone.

bulletNumber.description: Short milestone number such as 01 or 05.

heading.description: Heading displayed below the milestone marker.

description.description: Supporting milestone description shown under the heading. with max 80 characters

layouts.name: Title Description Image Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top-left, a paragraph block beneath the title, a large supporting image anchored on the right side of the slide.

layouts.name: Title Image Bullet Cards Slide

featureImage.description: Optional image used on the left side of the slide.

cards.description: Three solution cards. When the image is enabled, only the first two cards are displayed.

bulletNumber.description: Short description step number starting from 01...

description.description: Bullet point description shown inside the card.

layouts.name: Title Metrics Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title at the top and tall metric cards arranged horizontally below it. Each card can contain one or two stacked metric blocks, and each block includes a main value, a label, and a supporting description.

columns.description: Three metric columns displayed beneath the title.

metrics.description: One or two metrics shown in a single snapshot pill. Maximum two metrics.

value.description: Primary metric value shown in the pill.

label.description: Short label shown below the metric value.

description.description: Supporting metric description shown below the label.

layouts.name: Title Workflow with Title Description Slide
layouts.description: A slide with a title and a horizontal flow. Each step contains a circular icon area, a heading, and a description placed underneath. Directional connectors between the circles indicate sequence, and the activeIndex field determines which step is emphasized.

title.description: Slide title shown at the top-left.

activeIndex.description: Zero-based index of the emphasized service step.

items.description: Three sequential service items displayed on the slide.

heading.description: Heading shown below the service icon.

description.description: Supporting description below the service heading.

layouts.description: A responsive media-card grid that supports compact and dense arrangements.

layouts.description: A card grid that supports even layouts and odd-count variants with an emphasized trailing card.

layouts.description: A horizontal timeline with step markers, item text, continuation state, and optional endpoint label.

showEndLabel.description: Whether to show right-end label near timeline axis.

items.description: Timeline items from left to right.

description.description: Supporting copy for each timeline item.

layouts.name: Media and Text Split
layouts.description: A split composition with a title and media block on the left and supporting narrative plus footer text on the right.

sidePanelImage.description: Left media image used in image mode.

headline.description: Main headline text on the right.

layouts.name: Numbered Multi-Column Overview
layouts.description: A multi-column layout with numbered markers, short titles, and descriptive body text.

layouts.name: Overlapping Circle Cards
layouts.description: A horizontal row of overlapping circular cards with markers, titles, and text.

items.description: Circle cards from left to right.

layouts.name: Panel List with Media
layouts.description: A table layout with a left multi-column item list and a configurable right media or color panel.

sidePanelImage.description: Right-side panel image used in image mode.

items.description: Items shown in the left panel.

number.description: Section number shown on the right.

description.description: Optional item description used in description variants.
